description: Release User Is a ProtoFlux node that releases the user currently occupying an anchor.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to release the user in the provided Anchor (IAvatarAnchor).
fields.Anchor: The anchor to check for if a user is sitting in it.
fields.OnReleased: When the user in the provided anchor is released.
fields.OnFailure: When the provided Anchor (IAvatarAnchor) doesn't have a user and the * (Call) is fired, this will send an impulse.
